title: Pareto Population Evolution — ParetoFrontier + ParetoCompetitionOrchestrator

invariants_introduced.description: Scalar fitness advisory only — never drives dominance
Frontier computation deterministic: identical inputs → identical results
Non-empty input always produces non-empty frontier
GovernanceGate evaluates every frontier candidate independently

novelty: First constitutionally-governed mutation engine with Pareto multi-objective frontier replacing scalar fitness collapse. 5 objectives: correctness, efficiency, governance, maintainability, coverage_delta. Dominated candidates excluded from gate evaluation. Multiple non-dominated candidates eligible for simultaneous promotion.
